problem_statement: After UI redesign, keyboard navigation and screen reader flow seem broken on login/checkout.

tickets_raw.title: Screen reader labels missing on login form
Keyboard focus order broken on checkout

customer_notes_raw.text: Users with screen readers cannot complete login.

documents_raw.title: A11y note
documents_raw.text: WCAG basics: labels, focus order, contrast. Re-test after redesign.
